mask_rules.rule: Only allow SAFE_FIELD_ALLOWLIST fields into Consumer Payload.
Drop or remap any field matching permission, allowed, action, mutation, trigger, payload, execute, order, wallet, trade unless explicitly classified as SAFE_CONTEXT_KEEP.
Never expose archive_* or *_20260616 authority fields to active Consumer Binding.
Never derive active UI/Consumer fields from *_plan_noapi, *_rows_noapi, docs, reports, or archive plans.
Preserve negative authority-lock fields only as defense text, never as permission state.
Missing or masked field routes to REVIEW_REQUIRED or READONLY_CONTEXT, never ALLOW.
